additional_information:
ADDITIONAL INFORMATION ON RELEASE OF DANGEROUS SUBSTANCES TO INDOOR AIR, SOIL AND WATER DURING THE USE STAGE

INDOOR AIR
This material is not classified as dangerous by the European legislation. There is no dangerous substance, according to CE n° 1272/2008. The product does not need to be stamped, according to the CE directives (67/548/ECC or 1999/45/EC). A test following the ISO 16000 has been realized. The emission class the most beneficial is retained for this B-EPD.

SOIL AND WATER
Not applicable as this product is not in contact with water and soil.

DEMONSTRATION OF VERIFICATION

EN 15804+A2 serves as the core PCR
